mapper.select: SELECT block_code AS blockCode, user_code AS userCode, block_type AS blockType, position AS position FROM blocks WHERE user_code = #{userCode} ORDER BY position ASC, block_code ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO blocks(block_code, user_code, block_type, position) VALUES ( (SELECT NVL(MAX(block_code), 0) + 1 FROM blocks), #{userCode}, #{blockType}, #{position} )
mapper.select:
SELECT l.log_code AS logCode, l.project_code AS projectCode, p.project_name AS projectName,
l.action_type AS actionType, l.target_type AS targetType, l.target_code AS targetCode,
CASE WHEN l.target_type = 'ISSUE' THEN i.title ELSE NULL END AS issueTitle,
l.created_at AS createdAt, l.meta AS meta FROM logs l
JOIN projects p ON p.project_code = l.project_code
LEFT JOIN issues i ON l.target_type = 'ISSUE' AND i.issue_code = l.target_code
WHERE l.user_code = #{userCode} AND l.created_at >= #{from} AND l.created_at <= #{to}
ORDER BY l.created_at DESC

SELECT i.issue_code AS issueCode, i.project_code AS projectCode, p.project_name AS projectName, i.title AS title, NVL(i.started_at, i.created_at) AS startAt, NVL(i.resolved_at, i.due_at) AS endAt FROM projects p JOIN ( SELECT pru.project_code FROM project_role_user pru WHERE pru.user_code = #{userCode}
UNION
SELECT gpr.project_code FROM "GROUP_MEMBER" gm JOIN "GR_PRO_ROLE" gpr ON gpr.gr_code = gm.gr_code
WHERE gm.user_code = #{userCode} ) up ON up.project_code = p.project_code
JOIN issues i ON i.project_code = p.project_code
WHERE p.status = 'OD1' AND NVL(i.started_at, i.created_at) < #{to} AND NVL(NVL(i.resolved_at, i.due_at), NVL(i.started_at, i.created_at)) >= #{from}
ORDER BY p.project_name ASC, NVL(i.started_at, i.created_at) ASC, i.issue_code ASC
